title: Face Detection Box Alignment - 95% Facial Coverage

stories.title: HARGROVE face box covers 95% of face (clip 1, 0-3s)
acceptanceCriteria: iOS Simulator screenshot at t=1.5s of clip 1 shows cyan detection box overlapping 95%+ of HARGROVE's face
Box top edge is at or above forehead hairline
Box bottom edge is at or below chin
Box left edge is at or left of left ear/jaw
Box right edge is at or right of right ear/jaw

stories.title: WILLIAMS face box covers 95% of face (clip 1, 3-8s)
acceptanceCriteria: iOS Simulator screenshot at t=5s of clip 1 shows cyan detection box overlapping 95%+ of WILLIAMS's face
Box top edge is at or above forehead/hairline
Box bottom edge is at or below chin
Box left and right edges encompass full face width

stories.title: KAPOOR face box covers 95% of face (clip 2, 0-3.5s)
acceptanceCriteria: iOS Simulator screenshot at t=1.5s of clip 2 shows cyan detection box overlapping 95%+ of KAPOOR's face
Box encompasses forehead to chin, ear to ear

stories.title: TORRES face box covers 95% of face (clip 2, 3.5-8s)
acceptanceCriteria: iOS Simulator screenshot at t=5s of clip 2 shows cyan detection box overlapping 95%+ of TORRES's face
Box encompasses forehead to chin, ear to ear
